name: Anthropic
description: Anthropic Claude provider using Prometheus desktop authentication and setup token flow.

reasoning_effort.label: Thinking Effort
reasoning_effort.help: Anthropic effort level: low, medium, high, xhigh, or max.

extended_thinking.label: Claude Thinking
extended_thinking.help: Enable adaptive thinking on newer Claude models or legacy extended thinking on older models.

thinking_budget.label: Legacy Thinking Budget
thinking_budget.help: Token budget for older Claude models that still use manual extended thinking.
